title: The physics behind Flow Matching models
summary: Flow Matching is a training algorithm for generative models that uses time-variant velocity fields and the continuity equation from physics. The video provides an in-depth analysis of the algorithm's mathematical foundations, including optimal transport, conditional velocity fields, and comparisons with related concurrent works like Rectified Flow and Stochastic Interpolants.
